html:
Exclusive to:  

The Battle Helm is a wearable Armor item for the head slot in the Reign of Giants DLC and is exclusive to Wigfrid. Wigfrid starts the game with it in her Inventory and is the only character able to craft it. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 2 Rocks to craft.

It absorbs 80% of incoming damage and provides a 20% bonus to water resistance.

Due to its stats and cheap recipe, the Battle Helm is a great alternative to the Football Helmet and will secure the head armor slot for a long time for Wigfrid players.

Trivia

  • Attempting to spawn this item in with a console command or crafting it with a modded crafting recipe when not playing as Wigfrid will result in the item instantly disappearing from the inventory.
  • Willow's quote, "It's got a name scratched on the inside... "W", uh..." is a reference to the fact that every character 's name starts with a W, even including Maxwell, which is in fact his stage name from better days; his real name is William Carter.
  • Initially, Moonlight Diaden skin featured a star instead of Alter's symbol. It was changed presumably due to associations with the Star of David. [1]
  • Battle Helm was Character-Specific Item, but its changed in Don't Starve Mega Update.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Willow wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wendy wearing a Battle Helm.
  • WX-78 wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Woodie wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wes wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Maxwell wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Webber wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Winona wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Warly wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wortox wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wormwood wearing a Battle Helm.
  • Wurt wearing a Battle Helm.
  • The Battle Helm, as seen in the Summer teaser trailer for Reign of Giants.
  • Battle Helm Equipped

DSTDSRoGSWHam

  1. ↑ Tin Can on forums: A friend of mine [who is Jewish] pointed out that the star in Wigfrid's new helm skin [which is visible in her portrait] looks a bit too close to the Star of David and it made them uncomfortable. I suggest changing the shape of the star to be something more like these. both the portrait and skin for reference. note that the resemblance is more apparent in her portrait.

Exclusive to:
“Pretty fancy hat, that.”
–Wilson
“It's got a name scratched on the inside... "W", uh...”
–Willow
“Is strong helm for strong warrior!”
–Wolfgang
“Perhaps someone was playing dress-up. I suppose I missed it.”
–Wendy
“DUMB HAT”
–WX-78
“Anachronistic drivel.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty snappy looking.”
–Woodie
“Well... it's no crown.”
–Maxwell
“Upon closer inspection, it seems to be nothing more than a stage prop.”
–Wagstaff
“The pöwer öf the unicörn is great.”
–Wigfrid
“Haha! It's way too big for us!”
–Webber
“Aww, there's a little pony on it.”
–Walani
“I don't quite have the confidence to pull it off.”
–Warly
“'Tis no hat fer this ol'sea dog.”
–Woodlegs
“T'WOULD RESTRICT WILBA'S BOUNCY LOCKS!”
–Wilba
“Pokey branch hat”
–Wormwood
“Sure wish those wings were a little bigger.”
–Wheeler
“Surprisingly practical.”
–Winona
“I hope it fits over my horns.”
–Wortox
“Will wearing make me strong like Viking lady?”
–Wurt
“Maybe Pinetree Pioneers should start wearing helmets instead.”
–Walter
“It's not historically accurate, but I'll just keep that to myself.”
–Wanda
The Battle Helm is a wearable Armor item for the head slot in the Reign of Giants DLC and is exclusive to Wigfrid. Wigfrid starts the game with it in her Inventory and is the only character able to craft it. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 2 Rocks to craft.
It absorbs 80% of incoming damage and provides a 20% bonus to water resistance.
Due to its stats and cheap recipe, the Battle Helm is a great alternative to the Football Helmet and will secure the head armor slot for a long time for Wigfrid players.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Attempting to spawn this item in with a console command or crafting it with a modded crafting recipe when not playing as Wigfrid will result in the item instantly disappearing from the inventory.
Willow's quote, "It's got a name scratched on the inside... "W", uh..." is a reference to the fact that every character 's name starts with a W, even including Maxwell, which is in fact his stage name from better days; his real name is William Carter.
Initially, Moonlight Diaden skin featured a star instead of Alter's symbol. It was changed presumably due to associations with the Star of David. [1]
Battle Helm was Character-Specific Item, but its changed in Don't Starve Mega Update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Chiến Đấu là một vật phẩm Giáp có thể đeo được cho ô đầu trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants và chỉ có ở Wigfrid. Wigfrid bắt đầu trò chơi với nó trong Kho đồ của mình và là nhân vật duy nhất có thể chế tạo nó. Nó cần 2 Vàng Thỏi và 2 Đá để chế tạo.

The '''Battle Helm''' is a wearable [[Armor]] item for the head slot in the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC and is exclusive to [[Wigfrid]]. Wigfrid starts the game with it in her [[Inventory]] and is the only character able to craft it. It requires 2 [[Gold Nugget]]s and 2 [[Rocks]] to craft.

It absorbs 80% of incoming damage and provides a 20% bonus to [[Wetness|water resistance]].

Due to its stats and cheap recipe, the Battle Helm is a great alternative to the [[Football Helmet]] and will secure the head armor slot for a long time for Wigfrid players.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Attempting to spawn this item in with a console command or crafting it with a modded crafting recipe when not playing as Wigfrid will result in the item instantly disappearing from the inventory.
* Willow's quote, "It's got a name scratched on the inside... "W", uh..." is a reference to the fact that every character 's name starts with a W, even including Maxwell, which is in fact his stage name from better days; his real name is William Carter.
*Initially, Moonlight Diaden skin featured a star instead of Alter's symbol. It was changed presumably due to associations with the Star of David. <ref>[https://forums.kleientertainment.com/forums/topic/148464-wigfrids-new-helm-skin-looks-a-bit-too-close-to-the-star-of-david/#comment-1641617 Tin Can on forums]: A friend of mine [who is Jewish] pointed out that the star in Wigfrid's new helm skin [which is visible in her portrait] looks a bit too close to the Star of David and it made them uncomfortable. I suggest changing the shape of the star to be something more like these. both the portrait and skin for reference. note that the resemblance is more apparent in her portrait.</ref>
*Battle Helm was [[:Category:Character-Specific|Character-Specific]] Item, but its changed in [[Don't Starve Mega Update]].
